subject: A small humanoid figure and a large dog running together, their forms merging into a shared spectral white totem-spirit that flows behind them like a ghostly second body
description: A small humanoid figure crouches in a running pose on a cobblestone street, leaning forward with arms extended. Beside and slightly behind them bounds a large pale golden retriever-type dog, mouth open, ears back in motion. Both figures are partially overlaid with a translucent white spectral form — a luminous ghost-shape of the dog looms large behind and above, merging with the person in an enchantment totem visual. The setting is a modest village street with timber-framed structures visible in the background under a pale daylight sky. The palette is soft whites, pale golds, and muted greens.
foreground: humanoid figure and dog running together with spectral white totem overlay
background: village street, cobblestones, timber-frame buildings, pale sky
emotion: joyful momentum — dog's mouth open, figure leaning into the run
